conceptRunSummary.strategySummary: Fixture response for P0 source provenance validation.

candidates.title: Evidence Mission Board
candidates.oneLiner: A one-screen board that turns source evidence into inspectable product missions.
candidates.notObviousInsight: The reusable value is the source-to-mission structure, not the original domain.
candidates.userMoment: Checking whether an AI-generated product is grounded in evidence.
candidates.coreInteraction: Select a source card and reveal the mission proof.
candidates.whyDifferentFromRecentArtifacts: It exposes source provenance as the product surface.
candidates.antiCloneBoundary: Do not copy the source product domain, UI, claims, or implementation.
risks: Could read as an internal dashboard if copy is too operational.
successCriteria: User can identify source use policy
User can see a changed mission output
